text.title: AI-Assisted Single-Interview Analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Synthesis pulls a quote no one can locate in source.
antipattern.fix: Require line ranges; reject rows missing them.

antipattern.symptom: Researcher reads report; never sees that the interviewee said opposite things at L20 and L150.
antipattern.fix: Make contradiction section mandatory; default 'none detected' allowed.

antipattern.symptom: Follow-up list reads like a default template.
antipattern.root-cause: Followups not tied to specific contradiction/gap.
antipattern.fix: Require each follow-up to cite (line_range, reason).
